ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( ISNEW(), ISBLANK(TEXT( Applicable_Quote__c)), RecordType.Name = "Legal Services"),
AND($User.Id = Requester__r.Id, ISBLANK(TEXT( Applicable_Quote__c)), RecordType.Name = "Legal Services") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate the 'Applicable Quote' field with 'Yes' or 'No'.
